title: arachniodes × clivorum
intro: Arachniodes × clivorum, also known as the hybrid lady fern, is a sterile, perennial plant that is a cross between the Japanese lady fern (A. japonica) and the Clivella lady fern (A. nipponica). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Arachniodes × clivorum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and improve respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
